CREATE TABLE http_requests (id INT PRIMARY KEY, request_path VARCHAR(255));
SELECT http_path() AS absolute_path FROM http_requests WHERE id = 1;
SELECT http_path() AS absolute_path FROM http_requests WHERE request_path LIKE '/home/%';
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM http_requests) AS total_requests, http_path() AS current_path FROM http_requests WHERE request_path = '/services';
SELECT r1.request_path, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM http_requests r2 WHERE r2.request_path LIKE CONCAT(r1.request_path, '%')) AS sub_request_count FROM http_requests r1;
WITH RECURSIVE request_paths AS (SELECT request_path FROM http_requests UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(request_path, '/') FROM request_paths) SELECT * FROM request_paths;
SELECT http_path() AS absolute_path FROM http_requests WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM http_requests WHERE request_path IS NOT NULL);
SELECT r.id, r.request_path, http_path() AS absolute_path FROM http_requests r JOIN (SELECT id FROM http_requests WHERE request_path LIKE '/about%') AS filtered ON r.id = filtered.id;
DELETE FROM http_requests WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT MIN(id) FROM http_requests GROUP BY request_path);
